sources.evidence: Defines globally peer-reviewed Top 10 for autonomous and agentic AI systems.
Provides threat-model-based reference for emerging agentic threats and mitigations.
sources.source: OWASP Agentic AI - Threats and Mitigations

sources.evidence: Frames AI Exchange as comprehensive core framework for AI security fundamentals, controls, and standards alignment.
Used as prior governance basis for HITL, guardrails, and traceability patterns.

synthesis_points: OWASP Agentic Top 10 is the primary control taxonomy for this stage.
MetaBlooms already has resolver/BTS/pre/post gates; Stage 6O binds those controls to OWASP categories and forces classification before high-impact action.
Least-agency, observability, and human approval are directly relevant to exports, pointer promotions, installs, and broad repairs.
